requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Mauritius BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619作为毛里求斯BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619作為模里西斯BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Mauritius does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation directly equivalent to Saudi Arabia's SABER/IEC 62619 route, the EU Battery Regulation, or similar mandatory pre-shipment certification regimes. MSB (Mauritius Standards Bureau), established under the Mauritius Standards Bureau Act, is the national standards body and conformity assessment authority; MSB adopts and develops standards aligned with IEC and BS (British Standards) legacy, not Chinese GB. No confirmed MSB technical regulation specifically mandating pre-shipment BESS cell or system conformity assessment has been identified from official public sources as of the dataset date — exporters should verify the current MSB standards catalogue and any mandatory standards notification directly with MSB before shipment. However, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and CEB connection agreements and tender specifications for utility-scale storage projects are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. IEC 63056 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Requirements for the Safety of the Electrical Installations) may additionally be referenced in project specifications for system-level electrical safety.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路径、欧盟《电池法规》或类似强制装运前认证制度直接相当。MSB（毛里求斯标准局），依据《毛里求斯标准局法》设立，是国家标准机构和合格评定机关；MSB采纳并制定与IEC和BS（英国标准）传统对齐的标准，而非中国GB体系。截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方公开来源确认任何MSB专门强制要求装运前BESS电芯或系统合格评定的技术法规——出口商在出货前应直接向MSB核实现行MSB标准目录及任何强制标准通知。然而，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，CEB公用事业规模储能项目的并网协议和招标规格预计将以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。IEC 63056（用于电化学储能系统的二次锂电芯和电池——电气装置安全要求）亦可能在项目规格中被引用用于系统级电气安全。
summary.zht: 模里西斯目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與沙特阿拉伯SABER/IEC 62619路徑、歐盟《電池法規》或類似強制裝運前認證制度直接相當。MSB（模里西斯標準局），依據《模里西斯標準局法》設立，是國家標準機構和合格評定機關；MSB採納並制定與IEC和BS（英國標準）傳統對齊的標準，而非中國GB體系。截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方公開來源確認任何MSB專門強制要求裝運前BESS電芯或系統合格評定的技術法規——出口商在出貨前應直接向MSB核實現行MSB標準目錄及任何強制標準通知。然而，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，CEB公用事業規模儲能項目的併網協議和招標規格預計將以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。IEC 63056（用於電化學儲能系統的二次鋰電芯和電池——電氣裝置安全要求）亦可能在項目規格中被引用用於系統級電氣安全。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Mauritius CEB project specifications)

IEC 63056:2020 — Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Requirements for the Safety of the Electrical Installations (system-level electrical safety; expected in project specifications)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard referenced in project specifications)

MSB — Mauritius Standards Bureau (verify current mandatory standards catalogue and any conformity assessment obligation for BESS cells/systems directly with MSB; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific standard as of dataset date)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. GB/T 34131-2017 (Technical Requirements of Battery Management System for Electric Energy Storage System) governs the BMS. GB 38031-2020 (Electric Vehicles — Safety Requirements for Traction Battery) applies to traction batteries but is sometimes referenced as an additional cell safety data point for large-format lithium cells. These Chinese standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 or IEC 63056 and are not accepted as equivalents in Mauritius CEB project specifications or MSB conformity assessment. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。GB/T 34131-2017（电力储能用电池管理系统技术条件）管控电池管理系统（BMS）。GB 38031-2020（电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求）适用于动力电池，有时亦被引用作为大型锂电芯的附加电芯安全数据参考。上述中国标准未与IEC 62619或IEC 63056协调，不被毛里求斯CEB项目规格或MSB合格评定接受为等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619型式试验证书。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。GB/T 34131-2017（電力儲能用電池管理系統技術條件）管控電池管理系統（BMS）。GB 38031-2020（電動汽車用動力蓄電池安全要求）適用於動力電池，有時亦被引用作為大型鋰電芯的附加電芯安全數據參考。上述中國標準未與IEC 62619或IEC 63056協調，不被模里西斯CEB項目規格或MSB合格評定接受為等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619型式試驗證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)
GB/T 34131-2017 — 电化学储能系统用锂离子电池管理系统技术规范 (Technical Requirements of Battery Management System for Electrochemical Energy Storage System)
GB 38031-2020 — 电动汽车用动力蓄电池安全要求 (Electric Vehicles — Safety Requirements for Traction Battery)

gap.en: Critical gap: CEB project specifications and Mauritius project-owner requirements reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. MSB's standards framework is IEC/BS-aligned, not GB-aligned. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 34131-2017, and GB 38031-2020 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications or MSB conformity assessment. Exporters should: (a) verify the current MSB mandatory standards catalogue and any pre-shipment conformity assessment obligation for BESS cells and systems; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Mauritius BESS projects; (c) confirm whether IEC 63056 evidence is additionally required in CEB tender specifications or connection agreements; (d) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in project specifications before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：CEB项目规格和毛里求斯项目业主要求将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。MSB的标准框架与IEC/BS对齐，而非GB体系。中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 34131-2017和GB 38031-2020未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格或MSB合格评定接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实现行MSB强制标准目录及任何针对BESS电芯和系统的装运前合格评定义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至毛里求斯BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）确认CEB招标规格或并网协议是否额外要求IEC 63056证据；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格中引用的IEC 62619版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：CEB項目規格和模里西斯項目業主要求將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。MSB的標準框架與IEC/BS對齊，而非GB體系。中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 34131-2017和GB 38031-2020未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格或MSB合格評定接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實現行MSB強制標準目錄及任何針對BESS電芯和系統的裝運前合格評定義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至模里西斯BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）確認CEB招標規格或併網協議是否額外要求IEC 63056證據；（d）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格中引用的IEC 62619版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where CEB or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; MSB mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS cells/systems has not been confirmed from official public sources — verify directly with MSB
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 34131-2017 are voluntary

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Mauritius as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Mauritius CEB project specifications. MSB's standards framework is IEC/BS-aligned. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 34131-2017, and GB 38031-2020 certification alone is not sufficient for Mauritius project acceptance. Verify MSB current mandatory standards scope, and confirm IEC 62619 (and where applicable IEC 63056) evidence requirements with the project owner, CEB, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，毛里求斯尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是毛里求斯CEB项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。MSB的标准框架与IEC/BS对齐。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 34131-2017和GB 38031-2020认证不足以满足毛里求斯项目验收要求。出货前请核实MSB现行强制标准范围，并向项目业主、CEB及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619（及适用时IEC 63056）证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，模里西斯尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是模里西斯CEB項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。MSB的標準框架與IEC/BS對齊。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 34131-2017和GB 38031-2020認證不足以滿足模里西斯項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實MSB現行強制標準範圍，並向項目業主、CEB及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619（及適用時IEC 63056）證據要求。
